articles.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
articles.summary: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

articles.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
articles.summary: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

articles.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
articles.summary: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

articles.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
articles.summary: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

articles.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
articles.summary: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

articles.title: Why OpenAI really shut down Sora
articles.summary: OpenAI's decision last week to shut down Sora, its AI video-generation tool, just six months after releasing it to the public, raised immediate suspicions. The app had invited users to upload their own faces — so was this some kind of elaborate data grab?

articles.title: All the latest in AI ‘music’
articles.summary: AI has touched every part of the music industry, from sample sourcing and demo recording, to serving up digital liner notes and building playlists. There are technical and legal challenges, fierce ethical debates, and fears that the slop will simply crush working musicians through sheer volume. Is it art or just an output? What exactly […]
